provisions.content: This Notice may be cited as the Prisons Service (Specification of Ranks) Notice.

The Tanzania Prisons Service shall consist of the following ranks of Senior and Subordinate Prison Officers which are hereby specified in order of seniority: Senior Prison Officers: Principal Commissioner Commissioner Deputy Commissioner Senior Assistant Commissioner Assistant Commissioner Senior Superintendent Superintendent Assistant Superintendent Subordinate Prison Officers: Inspector Assistant Inspector Regimental Sergeant Major Staff Sergeant Corporal Warder/Wardress Recruit Warder/Wardress

[Revokes the Prisons Service (Specification of Ranks) Notices No. 20 of 1968, No. 51 of 1969 and No. 683 of 1995.] History of this document 31 July 2002 this version Consolidation 15 November 1997 Commenced Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all. Free Access to the law supports the rule of law and access to justice. TanzLII partners with African Legal Information Institute and Laws.Africa , who provide it with technical support.
